description.value: Price 25 gp ABOUT Refined from the thorns of a blood-red brush, this extract numbs the senses and evokes vivid hallucinations, heightened awareness, and altered thought processes. Although repeated doses can be toxic, bloodbrush extract is not widely used as a poison but rather as a recreational drug. DETAILS Type drug, ingested; Addiction mild; Fortitude DC 14 EFFECT 2 hours; +2 on Knowledge (arcana, planes, or religion) and Spellcraft checks, victim is distracted for the purposes of Perception checks. DAMAGE 1d2 Wis damage
